Rules.Name: VerifyTotalBilledAmount
Rules.Data_file_query: select cast(sum(MA_CLAIM_TOTAL_CHARGE_AMT) as decimal(20,2)) from data_file
Rules.Control_file_query: select cast(MA_TOTAL_BILLED_AMT as decimal(20,2)) from control_file

Rules.Name: VerifyTotalPaidAmount
Rules.Data_file_query: select cast(sum(MA_LINE_PURE_PAYMENT_AMT) as decimal(20,2)) from data_file
Rules.Control_file_query: select cast(MA_TOTAL_PAID_AMT as decimal(20,2)) from control_file
